WorkflowTaskDefinition.description: Single task in a workflow. Backend enforces requiredFields when completing this task or when transitioning out.

id.description: Task identifier; referenced in sequenceFlows from/to.

type.description: Task kind. userTask: human step; others: system actions.

requiredFields.description: Entity property names that must be set before this task can complete or before any outgoing transition. Enforced by backend; allows non-mandatory entity properties to be mandatory in this step.

config.description: Task-type-specific parameters (e.g. field name for updateField, template for sendNotification).

WorkflowSequenceFlowDefinition.description: Flow between two tasks. Condition is evaluated by backend before allowing transition.

condition.description: Optional expression (e.g. entity.approvalNotes != null); when false, transition is refused.

WorkflowDefinition.description: Workflow definition; defined only inside application definition. BPMN-aligned: startEvent, tasks, sequenceFlows.

entity.description: Entity id this workflow is bound to.

tasks.description: Workflow tasks; each has id, type, optional requiredFields and config.

sequenceFlows.description: Transitions between tasks; condition evaluated before allowing transition.
